_comment: Portable Stop-hook snippet for the git-flow-session-end module. Merge the `hooks.Stop` entry below into a host repo's .claude/settings.json (append to the existing Stop array if one is present). It runs session_end_guard.py — the runtime half of this module — which nudges the agent back onto the session-end loop when it tries to end a turn with a MERGED PR un-cleaned-up or an OPEN PR at the hand-off point. The `[ -f ] || exit 0` guard makes it a safe no-op until you vendor this module (which ships session_end_guard.py under modules/git-flow-session-end/), so the snippet is safe to paste before the script exists. The guard FAILS OPEN and honors stop_hook_active, so it can never loop or wedge a session. Disable for one session with SESSION_END_GUARD_DISABLED=1. Path assumes modules are vendored under $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/modules/ (the VENDORING.md convention); adjust if your host vendors elsewhere. See the companion index.md 'Enforcement' section for the prose.
